findings.description: High-confidence process_initiation cue was not covered by extracted artifacts.
findings.anchor_text: our board of directors determined that it was in the best interests of the company and its shareholders to confidentially approach strategic buyers

findings.description: High-confidence withdrawal_or_drop cue was not covered by extracted artifacts.
findings.anchor_text: WDC had decided to reconsider its interest in acquiring sTec and that it was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time

fixes_applied.action: Added target_sale event evt_006a grounded in B029 to capture the March 26, 2013 board decision to approach buyers.
Added corroborating span span_0064 on B076 to existing drop event evt_028 so the board-meeting report of WDC's withdrawal is covered.
